subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the Divine Lote-Tree! The sun is nigh to setting, and from its rising until this moment I have been engaged in writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنون رفیع سدره الهی قریب بغروب است و از طلوع تا بحال این خامه در تحریر
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
